text: I recall the night that you came to this well. I couldn't believe the doctor when he said this little girl. Well, I sat down and thought, you must be wrong, and you see I won't hold. Then he laid you in my arms, and my heart sang with joy. Daddy's girl, Daddy's girl, I'm a sinner of Daddy's girl. I know I'm Daddy's number one, for he loves me like I was a son. Daddy's girl. I recall the day.
